name: The Entrance Of Musketeer H.Q.
description:
You are in the Musketeer H.Q., this is just the atrium of the building, but
you notice that this place is not very elegant, the walls are painted in
blue the same as the ceiling, wish are made of stone. The floor is the only
thing that makes feel this place important, because is made out of white
marmol, which is very expensive. To the east yo see the cafeteria.
